modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble importing Excel data into Coyote Connections Watch List.

full_description_text: User wants to create a new Watch List in Coyote Connections. They asked if there's a way to import an Excel file or drop data directly into the system. Need to clarify if this is possible.
short_description: Trouble importing Excel data into Coyote Connections Watch List.
description: User wants to create a new Watch List in Coyote Connections. They asked if there's a way to import an Excel file or drop data directly into the system. Need to clarify if this is possible.
